Ilī-uṣrannī answered: "Yes, I owe you 2 minas 10 shekels of silver. I contest my seal. My tablet has been altered." Mannum-balum-Aššur said to Ilī-uṣrannī: "Surely, when I formally appointed you as witness for Aššūr-idī, did you or did you not assist him appearing before the station? Deny or confirm that to me!" Mannum-balum-Aššur said: "Remember what was sworn by an oath by the City, that he has argued in anger and that he refuses to answer me!"
